step.title: Attempting to fetch target branch HEAD
Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/70847424-d7ef-4573-ab81-3c142f5ef776.zip (9.70 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 468
Error occurred

step.title: Warning
step.text:
Exception in parallel rsync: ExitCode: 123, Output: Run rsync from: /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to: /home/site/wwwroot/ in 8 parallel threads Delete options: clean=True, use manifest=False, directory to ignore= Prev manifest = /tmp/tmp3l27O4.tmp and next /tmp/tmp3l27O4.tmp Cleaning up /tmp//filelist.txt and /tmp//splits Creating a list of all files at /tmp//filelist.txt No directory to exclude. Created /tmp//filelist.txt. Total number of files to be synced = 66. Created batches from the list of files. Processing 9 files in each thread Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.aa from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ac from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ab from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ad from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ae from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.af from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ah from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ag from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/
